[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 001011111 6
4 100111101 6
5 011101111 7
6 111110100 6
7 111111110 8
